name: preset-mcp-skills
description: Preset/Superset MCP skills for deterministic MCP tool discovery, safe MCP workflows, and MCP-only surface routing. Ask before switching to direct API.

interface.shortDescription: MCP-only Preset/Superset tool guidance. Ask before switching to direct API.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using Preset/Superset Model Context Protocol tools. Use when the user mentions MCP, MCP tools, MCP clients, Superset MCP, Preset MCP, or Copilot/MCP behavior. Includes MCP-only routing, deterministic discovery order, data-returning and mutating tool guardrails, and explicit approval before switching to direct API surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Run SQL through MCP with approval
